title: Peer-State DDS Examiner + Supervisor Pay Summary (Cross-State Roll-Up)
description: Synthesized cross-state summary of scheduled or estimated annual salary ranges for state Disability Determination Services (SSDI/SSI) line examiners and first-line supervisors, covering Massachusetts plus 17 peer states across two peer sets — population peers (workload-comparable) and bargaining peers (CBA-comparable). Each state block carries agency, class titles/codes, scheduled-rate source, annual min/max, bargaining status, and a per-state data_quality flag. Data quality varies widely: MA/MD/VA/WA/MN are authoritative scheduled rates while many states are third-party estimates or blocked fetches. This is a derived roll-up of the per-state scheduled-rates.json and research-notes.md files in this folder.
unit_of_observation: US state (and role within state: examiner / supervisor)

columns.name: states.<ST>.agency
columns.description: Administering state agency and DDS division.

columns.name: states.<ST>.examiner.class_codes
columns.description: Class code(s) and/or pay grade for the examiner role.

columns.name: states.<ST>.examiner.annual_min
columns.description: Examiner annual minimum (scheduled where data_quality is high; *_estimate variants used where only third-party data exists).

columns.name: states.<ST>.bargaining_status
columns.description: Union / bargaining-unit representation for the role.

columns.name: states.<ST>.data_quality
columns.description: Per-state data-quality assessment (high / medium / low / very low, with own-data caveats).

geographic_coverage: United States — MA + peer states (population set: MA, TN, AZ, IN, MD, VA, WA, MO, WI; bargaining set: MA, MD, WA, NY, CA, OR, MN, NJ, CT, HI, PA, NV, IL, MI plus AK, MT, ME, VT not yet pulled)

source.publisher: 509dds-data (compiled from state HR / comptroller schedules, union CBAs, and third-party aggregators)
source.title: Peer-state DDS pay summary (Tier 2: state class specs + scheduled pay grades)

notes: Synthesized roll-up generated 2026-05-08; therefore Computed rather than Authoritative even though individual high-quality states (MA/MD/VA/WA/MN) carry authoritative scheduled rates. Annual figures are USD. Many states expose *_estimate fields (Glassdoor/ZipRecruiter) and TBD/PENDING placeholders rather than scheduled rates. data_quality_summary buckets states into high/medium/low; follow_up_data_gaps and manual_fetch_workflow_for_blocked_states catalog the unresolved fetches. MA supervisor figure is CTHRU 2023 actual-paid, not a chart rate. Tier 1 (BLS OEWS SOC 43-4061) deferred — needs an api.bls.gov key.
